◎简　　介  

　　DeadWest - or The Rise of the Horror Genre and the Fall of the Western. Thestory of a western movie actor (Johnny Dust) still trying to make itbig in a western film studio and theme park, when a 'new managementteam' takes over the park and turns the film studio into a fright-festfor the month of Halloween.
